core_principle.statement: The logo is not a symbol of decoration, but a visual representation of architectural transformation into engineered systems.
core_principle.interpretation: Logo must behave like a system diagram, not an artistic emblem.

logo_identity_concept.logic_flow: Line → Module → System → Transformation Point → Execution Reality
logo_identity_concept.meaning: The logo visualizes the process of converting architectural intent into engineered, buildable systems.

logo_positioning.role: Engineering identity marker for architectural systems
logo_positioning.function: Represents system intelligence, not product identity

design_principles.description: Logo must reflect structured system logic, not illustrative shapes.
Logo must be constructed using grid-based system logic.
Logo must show progression from simple structure to system completion.

variant_a.name: Linear Transformation System
variant_a.description: A single line evolves into structured system ending in transformation point

variant_b.name: Modular Grid System
variant_b.description: Grid-based composition showing architectural system order

variant_c.name: Convergence System
variant_c.description: Multiple lines converge into a single engineered point

color_logic.rule: Gold only appears at transformation point, never as structure

logo_behavior_rules.description: Logo must avoid ornamental or illustrative forms.
No building icons, roofs, or ceiling metaphors.
Every element must align with system grid logic.

strategic_goal.objective: Create a logo that behaves like a system diagram of architectural transformation
strategic_goal.outcome: Instant recognition of AvizSazeh as a structured engineering system brand
